top_items.title: Next Forcing: Causal World Modeling with Multi-Chunk Prediction

definition: World models are systems that learn an internal representation of how an environment behaves so an agent can predict future states and plan actions, addressing the question of whether AI can reason about and simulate the world rather than just react to it.
